hero.name: Soumya Das
hero.title: AI Engineer
hero.bio: AI Engineer focused on LLM infrastructure, distributed systems, and edge deployment. Currently at SuperAlign.ai, building benchmarking pipelines across 100+ GPUs.

highlights: Building distributed LLM benchmarking systems across 100+ GPUs
Managing bare-metal resources with Proxmox and Coolify
Optimizing inference pipelines using vLLM and ONNX runtime
Prototyping LiFi high-speed optical communication systems
Leading hardware-software integration for IoT applications

education.degree: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering

projects.title: PII & PHI Detection Browser Agent
projects.description: Browser extension using transformer models for real-time detection of sensitive data. Optimized for edge deployment with ONNX runtime.

projects.title: Noties v2.0
projects.description: Local AI meeting assistant with real-time transcription using Whisper. Captures audio via WASAPI loopback for privacy-first note-taking.

projects.title: Queuebit
projects.description: Asynchronous document processing pipeline with job queuing. Built on Redis streams and BullMQ for scalable batch operations.
